scripts.predev: node scripts/build-user-guide.mjs && node scripts/check-version-sync.js && node scripts/check-wmap-update.js
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/build-user-guide.mjs && node scripts/check-version-sync.js && node scripts/check-wmap-update.js && node scripts/check-wmap-published.js
scripts.prebuild:web: node scripts/build-user-guide.mjs && node scripts/check-version-sync.js && node scripts/check-wmap-update.js && node scripts/check-wmap-published.js
scripts.build:site: npm run build:web && ${ZENSICAL:-zensical} build --clean && cp -r dist site/app
scripts.release: npm run tauri build -- --no-bundle && npm run install-bin
scripts.tauri: env -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULEDIR -u GIO_MODULE_DIR -u GTK_IM_MODULE_FILE -u LOCPATH tauri
scripts.wmap:link: npm link @paulrobins/wafermap && echo '\n  ✓ linked to ../wmap — run `npm run build` in ../wmap after each change so dist/ refreshes. Unlink before releasing: npm run wmap:unlink'
scripts.wmap:unlink: npm unlink @paulrobins/wafermap && npm install @paulrobins/wafermap && echo '\n  ✓ unlinked — restored published wmap from npm'
